recommendations.title: Hold Your Breath
recommendations.overview: In 1930s Oklahoma amid the region's horrific dust storms, a woman is convinced that a sinister presence is threatening her family.

recommendations.title: Elvira: Mistress of the Dark
recommendations.overview: Arriving in the small town of Fallwell, Massachusetts to claim her inheritance, horror hostess Elvira receives a less than enthusiastic reception from the conservative locals, including her sinister uncle Vincent.

recommendations.title: Tigers Are Not Afraid
recommendations.overview: When her mother suddenly disappears with no one to care for her, young Estrella ends up on the street and joins a gang of children, triggering a dangerous and tragic chain of events.

recommendations.title: Tales from the Darkside: The Movie
recommendations.overview: A young boy tells three stories of horror to distract a witch who plans to eat him.

recommendations.title: The Witches
recommendations.overview: A young boy named Luke and his grandmother go on vacation only to discover their hotel is hosting an international witch convention, where the Grand High Witch is unveiling her master plan to turn all children into mice. Will Luke fall victim to the

recommendations.title: Inheritance
recommendations.overview: The patriarch of a wealthy and powerful family suddenly passes away, leaving his wife and daughter with a shocking secret inheritance that threatens to unravel and destroy their lives.

recommendations.title: Evil Eye
recommendations.overview: A seemingly perfect romance turns dark when a mother becomes convinced her daughter’s new boyfriend has a sinister connection to her own past.

recommendations.title: The Love Witch
recommendations.overview: A modern-day witch uses spells and magic to get men to fall in love with her, with deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: Ballerina
recommendations.overview: In 1879 Paris, a young orphan dreams of becoming a ballerina and flees her rural Brittany for Paris, where she passes for someone else and accedes to the position of pupil at the Grand Opera house.

recommendations.title: Paranormal Activity: The Ghost Dimension
recommendations.overview: Using a special camera that can see spirits, a family must protect their daughter from an evil entity with a sinister plan.
